acts.label: COLORS MELT
acts.why: Captures the quiet window at 120-123s where Verse 2's 'Every color melts into gray' create

acts.label: ASCEND TO LIGHT
acts.why: Marks the Bridge's spiritual ascent starting at 161s; this act visualizes the lyrical prog

acts.label: DRIFT ETERNAL
acts.why: Finalizes the showcase on the repeating tail end of 'Days drift by' and the fade into rain
